flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Neosho County Community College fell 70% between 2006 and 2009 (21.1% → 6.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Neosho County Community College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $5.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Neosho County Community College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $5.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Neosho County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).
